title: LyondellBasell Industries (LYB) Hikes Quarterly Dividend by 5%
text: LyondellBasell (LYB) declares a special dividend of $5.20 per share and a quarterly dividend of $1.19 per share.

title: LyondellBasell stock rallies after special dividend announced, regular dividend raised
text: Shares of LyondellBasell Industries N.V. LYB, +2.28% rose 1.1% in premarket trading Friday, after the U.K.-based chemical company said it will pay a special dividend of $5.20 a share, after setting new records for cash generation in 2021.

title: Time To Buy The Dip? 5 Dirt-Cheap Dividends To Consider
text: Thanks to the market's selloff, we finally have some dividend deals out there.

title: Why We Just Sold LyondellBasell Industries Stock
text: LYB has had strong performance momentum lately and is returning a lot of cash to shareholders while also deleveraging that balance sheet. While there is a lot to like about LYB, we want a portfolio of our highest conviction picks.

title: Is LyondellBasell (LYB) a Potential Stock for Value Investors?
text: Is LyondellBasell (LYB) a great pick from the value investor's perspective right now? Read on to know more.
